UpdateBlbModifyProtection.blbId: The identifier of the associated LoadBalancer
UpdateBlbModifyProtection.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters
UpdateBlbModifyProtection.allowModify: true indicates modification is allowed (protection disabled); false indicates modification is not allowed (protection enabled)
UpdateBlbModifyProtection.modificationProtectionReason: Reason for protection, with a length of 0 to 128 characters
